<think> I'm thinking of Park Sang-min, a South Korean singer and actor. I'm trying to recall what he received in 2004. I'm searching through my knowledge of awards and recognitions in the music industry. Ah, I think I have it! Park Sang-min received the Best New Male Artist award at the 2004 Mnet KM Music Festival, which is a major annual end of the year music program broadcast in South Korea. The Mnet KM Music Festival is also known as the Mnet Asian Music Awards (MAMA). </think>
<answer> Mnet KM Music Festival </answer>
